---
title: "Tree Maintenance Assignments"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
.quarto-layout-row { column-gap: 2em; }
</style>
```

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
source(here::here('Trees/Maintenance/AssignPeopleToTrees.R'))
library(leaflet)
library(gt)

gpkg_path = here::here('Trees/Maintenance/assignments/Assignments.gpkg')

# Read expanded polygon assignments; join people for color and address
polygons = st_read(gpkg_path, layer = 'polygon_areas_edited-expanded', quiet = TRUE) |>
  left_join(
    st_drop_geometry(people) |> select(person_id, color, Addr),
    join_by(person_id)
  )

# Trees 2017–2025
trees_all = all_trees |>
  filter(Year >= 2017, Year <= 2025) |>
  mutate(
    Street = str_to_title(Street),
    Addr   = make_address(Num, Street)
  )

# Assign trees to polygons via spatial join
trees_assigned = st_join(
  trees_all,
  polygons |> select(person_id),
  join = st_within
)

in_multiple = trees_assigned |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  count(Addr, Year) |>
  filter(n > 1)
if (nrow(in_multiple) > 0) {
  stop(glue::glue('{nrow(in_multiple)} tree location(s) fall within multiple polygons:\n',
                  paste(in_multiple$Addr, collapse = '\n')))
}

outside = filter(trees_assigned, is.na(person_id))
if (nrow(outside) > 0) {
  stop(glue::glue('{nrow(outside)} tree(s) are not within any polygon:\n',
                  paste(outside$Addr, collapse = '\n')))
}

```

```{r}
#| label: display
#| layout: [[40, 60]]

# --- Shared summary ----------------------------------------------------------
trees_assigned_summary = trees_assigned |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  summarize(
    recent = sum(count[Year >= 2023]),
    mid    = sum(count[Year >= 2020 & Year <= 2022]),
    early  = sum(count[Year >= 2017 & Year <= 2019]),
    .by    = person_id
  )

# --- Table -------------------------------------------------------------------
table_data = trees_assigned_summary |>
  right_join(
    st_drop_geometry(people) |> select(person_id, Addr, color),
    join_by(person_id)
  ) |>
  replace_na(list(recent = 0, mid = 0, early = 0)) |>
  arrange(person_id)

gt_tbl = table_data |>
  select(Addr, recent, mid, early) |>
  gt(rowname_col = 'Addr') |>
  tab_stubhead(label = 'Maintainer') |>
  cols_label(
    recent = html('2023–<br>2025'),
    mid    = html('2020–<br>2022'),
    early  = html('2017–<br>2019')
  ) |>
  cols_align('right', columns = c(recent, mid, early)) |>
  grand_summary_rows(
    columns = c(recent, mid, early),
    fns     = list(Total ~ sum(.)),
    fmt     = ~fmt_integer(.)
  ) |>
  tab_options(table.font.size = '80%', data_row.padding = '4px') |>
  cols_width(Addr ~ px(160)) |>
  opt_css('div.gt_container { padding-top: 0 !important; }')

for (i in seq_len(nrow(table_data))) {
  gt_tbl = gt_tbl |>
    tab_style(
      style     = cell_fill(color = adjustcolor(table_data$color[i], 
                                                alpha.f = 0.3)),
      locations = list(cells_body(rows = i), cells_stub(rows = i))
    )
}

gt_tbl

# --- Map ---------------------------------------------------------------------
polygons_4326 = polygons |> st_transform(4326)
people_4326   = people   |> st_transform(4326)

make_label = function(addr, year, name_label) {
  glue::glue('{addr} ({year})<br>{name_label}') |>
    as.character() |> 
    lapply(htmltools::HTML) |> 
    unname()
}

trees_recent = trees_assigned |>
  filter(Year >= 2023) |>
  mutate(label = make_label(Addr, Year, name_label)) |>
  st_transform(4326)

trees_mid = trees_assigned |>
  filter(Year >= 2020, Year <= 2022) |>
  mutate(label = make_label(Addr, Year, name_label)) |>
  st_transform(4326)

trees_early = trees_assigned |>
  filter(Year >= 2017, Year <= 2019) |>
  mutate(label = make_label(Addr, Year, name_label)) |>
  st_transform(4326)

people_labels = people |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  left_join(trees_assigned_summary, join_by(person_id)) |>
  replace_na(list(recent = 0, mid = 0, early = 0)) |>
  mutate(
    label = glue::glue(
      '<b>{Addr}</b> ({recent + mid + early} trees)<br>2023–2025: <b>{recent}</b><br>2020–2022: <b>{mid}</b><br>2017–2019: <b>{early}</b>'
    ) |> lapply(htmltools::HTML) |> unname()
  )

# Connect people to polygons with a line
connectors = map(seq_len(nrow(people)), \(i) {
  pid  = people$person_id[i]
  poly = polygons[polygons$person_id == pid, ]
  if (nrow(poly) == 0) return(NULL)
  st_sf(
    color    = people$color[i],
    geometry = st_nearest_points(st_geometry(people)[i], st_geometry(poly)[1])
  )
}) |>
  discard(is.null) |>
  bind_rows() |>
  st_transform(4326)

leaflet(width = '100%', height = '80vh') |>
  addProviderTiles('CartoDB.Positron',  group = 'Street') |>
  addProviderTiles('Esri.WorldImagery', group = 'Satellite') |>
  addPolygons(
    data        = polygons_4326,
    fillColor   = ~color,
    stroke      = FALSE,
    fillOpacity = 0.3,
    group       = 'Groups'
  ) |>
  addPolylines(
    data    = connectors,
    color   = ~color,
    weight  = 4,
    opacity = 0.5,
    group   = 'Groups'
  ) |>
  addCircleMarkers(
    data        = trees_recent,
    radius      = 3,
    label       = ~label,
    fillColor   = 'black',
    fillOpacity = 1,
    stroke      = FALSE,
    group       = '2023–2025'
  ) |>
  addCircleMarkers(
    data        = trees_mid,
    radius      = 2.6,
    label       = ~label,
    fillColor   = '#1f78b4',
    fillOpacity = 1,
    stroke      = FALSE,
    group       = '2020–2022'
  ) |>
  addCircleMarkers(
    data        = trees_early,
    radius      = 1.6,
    label       = ~label,
    fillColor   = '#fa3f46',
    fillOpacity = 1,
    stroke      = FALSE,
    group       = '2017–2019'
  ) |>
  addCircleMarkers(
    data        = people_4326,
    radius      = 4,
    label       = people_labels$label,
    color       = 'black',
    fillColor   = ~color,
    fillOpacity = 1,
    weight      = 2,
    group       = 'Maintainers'
  ) |>
  addLayersControl(
    baseGroups    = c('Street', 'Satellite'),
    overlayGroups = c('Groups', '2023–2025', '2020–2022', '2017–2019', 'Maintainers'),
    options       = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
  )
```
